Alienators are psychohazards that cause [[alienation]]
For example [[individualism]]. [[incel]] ideology, sexism, [[capitalism]].
[[Category:Alienators]]
[[sn:Alienators]][[Category:Alienation]] [[Category:Psychohazards]]
[[sn:Alienators]]Alienators  are the worst of psychohazards because community is core to overcoming the [[nine plagues]]. This is why [[alienation]] is the first plague in the list and why the [[Omega Covenant]] addresses only alienation among the plagues

==references ==[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
